Step:2 Lift one foot off the ground and extend it forward, keeping it parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:4 Lower yourself until your thigh is parallel to the ground, then push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
name: barbell one leg squat

instructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Place a barbell across your shoulders, gripping it with an overhand grip and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest lifted as you slowly lower your body down by bending your knees, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell squat (on knees)

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold a barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, bending at the knees and hips.
Step:4 As you lower, push your knees out to the sides and keep your weight on your heels.
Step:5 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell side split squat

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower into a squat position, gripping the barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and chest up as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees.
Step:4 As the barbell reaches hip level, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides.
Step:5 As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, pulling yourself into a deep squat position.
Step:6 Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your knees bent.
Step:7 Stand up by extending your hips and knees, keeping the barbell overhead.
Step:8 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: snatch pull

instructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height.
Step:3 Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm on top of your left arm.
Step:4 Interlace your fingers and press your palms together.
Step:5 Gently squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your hands forward, feeling a stretch in your chest and front of your shoulders.
Step:6 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: chest and front of shoulder stretch

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: lever incline chest press

instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 Push through your palms explosively to propel your body off the ground.
Step:4 While in mid-air, clap your hands together before landing back in the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: clap push up

instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands on the medicine ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: push-up medicine ball

instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell with both hands above your chest, arms extended.
Step:2 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell pullover on exercise ball

instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed firmly against the bench.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and lift them to shoulder height.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell incline bench press

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Slowly lower the handles back towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: lever decline chest press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: medicine ball chest push single response

instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells towards your chest, allowing your elbows to flare out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell reverse bench press

instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:2 Using your thigh to help raise the dumbbell, lift it up to shoulder width with your palm facing your torso.
Step:3 Rotate your wrist so that the palm of your hand is facing forward.
Step:4 As you breathe in, lower the dumbbell slowly to the side until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Exhale and use your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
name: dumbbell decline one arm fly

instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
name: dumbbell one leg fly on exercise ball

instructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables and lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the handles with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: cable lying fly

instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with one hand and extend your arm straight up above your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arm straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
name: dumbbell one arm pullover on exercise ball

instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the edge of a bench or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the bench by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: incline reverse grip push-up

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on top of your thigh.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbell pressed against your thigh.
Step:3 Using your free hand, help lift the dumbbell up to the starting position.
Step:4 Hold the dumbbell directly above your shoulder with your arm extended and palm facing inward.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:6 Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.
name: dumbbell one arm bench fly

instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and dumbbells in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball until your lower back is supported on the ball and your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell press on exercise ball

instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and the dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball down your back until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight and maintaining control.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 While keeping your arms extended, lift your hips off the ground, squeezing your glutes and engaging your core.
Step:7 (wall variation) Lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: wall style dumbbell pullover hip extension on exercise ball

instructions: Step:1 Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 (fierce variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: fierce weighted straight bar dip

instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Emphasize modified control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
name: dumbbell incline one arm press on exercise ball modified

instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands placed slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body down towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower yourself, lean your body forward and lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your hands. Perform with stretched intensity.
Step:4 Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground.
Step:5 Push through your hands and extend your arms to lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Maintain a straight line from your head to your heels throughout the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: stretched full planche push-up

instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower, rotate your body to the left, extending your left arm straight out to the side. Focus on extreme movement.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position, while rotating your body to the center.
Step:5 Repeat the push-up, this time rotating your body to the right and extending your right arm out to the side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides with each repetition.
name: clock push-up extreme

instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the exercise ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you. Focus on partial movement.
Step:3 Slowly bring the exercise ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: chest stretch with exercise ball partial

instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 (gentle variation) Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
name: gentle style dumbbell one leg fly on exercise ball

instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in one hand, with your palm facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow locked and your wrist straight.
Step:4 Slowly lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm. Emphasize contracted control.
name: contracted kettlebell extended range one arm press on floor

instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a wide reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in and your wrists straight. Focus on horizontal movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell wide reverse grip bench press horizontal

instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a mat or bench with your legs fully extended.
Step:2 (flexible variation) Have a partner or use a resistance band to secure your ankles.
Step:3 Engage your hamstrings and lift your legs towards your glutes, keeping your knees straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: flexible assisted prone hamstring

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the ankle straps are at the lowest setting.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your legs extended and the ankle straps attached to your feet.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles of the bench for stability.
Step:4 Bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstrings.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain inverted form throughout.
name: inverted style inverse leg curl (on pull-up cable machine)

instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 As you push back up, lift one leg off the ground and kick it out to the side, keeping it straight.
Step:4 Lower your leg back down and repeat the push-up, then switch to the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating leg kicks with each push-up repetition.
name: push-up inside leg kick

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending both knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell contralateral forward lunge

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your ankles.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground.
Step:4 As you lower, push your hips back and allow your knees to bend slightly.
Step:5 Lower the band towards the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your upper body back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: band stiff leg deadlift

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell close to your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by bending at the knees and hips.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: kettlebell goblet squat

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Extend one leg forward and keep it off the ground throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Bend your standing leg and lower your body down as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your back straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
name: dumbbell single leg squat

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down.
Step:4 Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair.
Step:5 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:6 Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Step:7 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell full squat (back pov)

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and arms extended to the sides.
Step:2 Keeping your legs straight, bend forward at the waist and reach down towards your toes with your right hand.
Step:3 As you reach down, simultaneously lift your left leg straight up behind you, maintaining balance.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat the movement with your left hand reaching towards your toes and your right leg lifting up behind you.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
name: arms apart circular toe touch (male)

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your torso to lean forward.
Step:3 Continue lowering the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell straight leg deadlift

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Place your left foot on a stepbox or elevated surface behind you.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and core engaged, hinge forward at the hips, lowering the dumbbell towards the ground.
Step:4 As you lower the dumbbell, simultaneously lift your left leg behind you, maintaining a straight line from head to heel.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell until you feel a stretch in your right hamstring, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
name: dumbbell single leg deadlift with stepbox support

instructions: Step:1 Place a band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:2 Stand facing a step or platform with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:3 Step up onto the platform with your right foot, pushing through your heel.
Step:4 Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Step:5 Lower your left foot back down to the ground.
Step:6 Repeat with your left foot stepping up onto the platform.
Step:7 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
name: band step-up

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot slightly off the ground.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips and lower the dumbbell towards the ground.
Step:4 At the same time, extend your right leg straight behind you, maintaining a slight bend in your left knee.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell until your torso and right leg are parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
name: dumbbell single leg deadlift

instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for stability.
Step:3 Engaging your glutes and hamstrings, lift your legs up towards the ceiling as high as you can.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: reverse hyper extension (on stability ball)

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, hinge forward at the hips, pushing your glutes back.
Step:4 Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:5 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell stiff leg good morning

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body.
Step:5 Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the barbell.
Step:6 Once you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, push your hips forward and stand up straight.
Step:7 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:8 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell romanian deadlift

instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and the kettlebell held in your right hand, arm fully extended above your shoulder.
Step:2 Bend your right knee and place your right foot flat on the ground, keeping your left leg extended.
Step:3 Pressing through your right foot, lift your hips off the ground, coming into a bridge position.
Step:4 Slide your left leg underneath your body, bending your left knee and placing your left foot flat on the ground.
Step:5 Rotate your torso to the left, bringing your left hand to the ground for support.
Step:6 Pressing through your right foot and left hand, lift your torso off the ground, coming into a kneeling position.
Step:7 From the kneeling position, stand up, keeping the kettlebell extended overhead.
Step:8 Reverse the movement to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat the exercise on the other side, starting with the kettlebell in your left hand.
name: kettlebell turkish get up (squat style)

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Place the barbell on your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to squat down, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:4 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell high bar squat

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the kettlebell with both hands in front of your chest, close to your body.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your hips down and back, as if sitting into a chair.
Step:4 Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Drive through your heels to stand back up, squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: kettlebell front squat

instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your legs extended.
Step:2 Bend your right knee and place your right ankle on your left thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Grasp your left thigh with both hands and gently pull it towards your chest.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Release and repeat on the other side.
name: assisted lying glutes stretch

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body, arms extended downwards.
Step:3 Bend at your hips and knees, lowering the dumbbells towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Push through your heels and extend your hips and knees, lifting the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell deadlift

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body.
Step:4 Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the dumbbell upwards in a straight line.
Step:5 As the dumbbell reaches shoulder height, quickly rotate your hand and punch it overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:6 Catch the dumbbell overhead with a slight bend in your knees and hips.
Step:7 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
name: dumbbell one arm snatch

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the foot platform.
Step:3 Position your feet wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push against the foot platform to extend your legs and straighten your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bend your knees to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: sled 45в° leg wide press

instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend one leg straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and lift your hips off the ground, forming a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.
name: single leg bridge with outstretched leg

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Step:2 Place a barbell on the ground in front of you, centered between your feet.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, to grip the barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:4 Engage your core and drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees simultaneously.
Step:5 As you lift, keep your chest up and back straight, and push your hips forward to fully engage your glutes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell sumo deadlift

instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell lying rear lateral raise

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and grasp the handles of the cable machine with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Position your hands at shoulder height, with your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Keep your core engaged and your back straight.
Step:4 Press one handle up and forward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:7 Alternate between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
name: cable alternate shoulder press

instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down with your palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell incline rear lateral raise

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell rear lateral raise

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Lower the kettlebells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: kettlebell seated press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell lateral raise

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band in front of your thighs with your palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift them up and out to the sides, forming a 'Y' shape with your body.
Step:3 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: band y-raise

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your shoulders.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and back straight, lift the barbell up and away from your body, raising it to shoulder height.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: landmine lateral raise

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Step:3 Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
name: cable one arm lateral raise

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise the kettlebell up to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Extend your arm fully overhead, straightening your elbow.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back down to shoulder height, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
name: kettlebell pirate supper legs

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards, and raise them to shoulder height.
Step:3 Press one dumbbell up overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height.
Step:4 Lower the raised dumbbell back to shoulder height while simultaneously pressing the other dumbbell up overhead.
Step:5 Continue alternating between arms for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell seated alternate shoulder

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and pointing forward.
Step:4 Press the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell seated bradford rocky press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge at the hips, lowering the kettlebell between your legs.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, using the momentum to swing the kettlebell up to shoulder height.
Step:4 As the kettlebell reaches shoulder height, rotate your wrist and punch your hand straight up, locking out your arm overhead.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: kettlebell one arm clean and jerk

instructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a stationary object at chest height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands in front of you.
Step:3 Keep your arms straight and lift them out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: band reverse fly

instructions: Step:1 Attach a stirrup handle to a low cable pulley and stand facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with your left hand and take a step back with your right foot, positioning your body at a slight angle.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 With your left arm extended and your palm facing down, pull the handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blade.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your shoulder blade.
Step:6 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your right arm.
name: cable rear delt row (stirrups)

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms are facing forward at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell arnold press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Continue lifting your arms until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: weighted round arm

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and dip your body down, then explosively extend your legs and press the dumbbells overhead.
Step:3 Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbells back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell push press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down towards the ground, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lift your arms out to the sides and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell rear fly

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell front raise

instructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your shoulder muscles and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles towards the front of your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: cable standing cross-over high reverse fly

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell standing overhead press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides at shoulder height, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly rotate your arms in a circular motion, bringing the dumbbells in front of your body and then overhead.
Step:4 Continue the circular motion, bringing the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell standing around world

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet.
Step:2 Hold the band handles at shoulder height with your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Engage your core and press the band overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 As you press, twist your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the press and twist on the opposite side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
name: band twisting overhead press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell rear lateral raise (support head)

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended and your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Continue lifting until the dumbbells are at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell upright row (back pov)

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, exhale and lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell upright row v. 2

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Let the barbell hang in front of your thighs, arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and back straight, exhale as you lift the barbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell upright row v. 3

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, with your palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: smith standing military press

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the kettlebells overhead by extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to shoulder level.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: kettlebell seated two arm military press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band under your feet.
Step:2 Hold the band with your palms facing forward and raise your hands to shoulder height, elbows bent.
Step:3 Press the band overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the band back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: band shoulder press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Slowly raise the barbell in front of you, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until the barbell is slightly above shoulder level.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell standing front raise over head

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell in front of your thighs with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift the barbell forward and upward until it reaches shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell front raise

instructions: Step:1 Start in a kneeling position with your knees hip-width apart and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a weight in each hand, with your arms extended straight down in front of you.
Step:3 Engage your core and swing the weights up and overhead, keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Lower the weights back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: weighted kneeling step with swing

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell seated shoulder press (parallel grip)

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell scott press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at arm's length in front of your thighs.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back flat and chest up.
Step:3 In one explosive motion, extend your hips, knees, and ankles, and simultaneously pull the kettlebells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 As the kettlebells reach shoulder level, rotate your wrists and punch the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Lower the kettlebells back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: kettlebell double snatch

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lean back and position the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell bench seated press

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell seated lateral raise v. 2

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the lever handle with one hand and position your elbow at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Press the lever upward until your arm is fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the lever back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
name: lever one arm shoulder press

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at shoulder level.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: lever shoulder press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells straight up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder height, rotating your wrists back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell cuban press v. 2

instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by your arm.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in your top hand with your palm facing down.
Step:3 Keeping your arm straight, raise the dumbbell up to shoulder height.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
name: dumbbell side lying one hand raise

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, behind your head.
Step:4 Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell seated behind head military press

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: lever military press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the kettlebells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the kettlebells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: kettlebell two arm military press

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your arm extended straight out in front of you, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow slightly bent and your shoulder blades pulled back and down.
Step:4 Slowly rotate your arm inward, bringing the cable handle towards the center of your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
name: cable seated shoulder internal rotation

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Place your other hand on a stable surface, such as a bench or wall, for support.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:4 Raise the dumbbell out to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:5 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
name: dumbbell one arm lateral raise with support

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder height with your palm facing inwards.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
name: dumbbell standing one arm palm in press

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the barbell upwards.
Step:5 As the barbell reaches chest level, pull it upwards with your arm, keeping it close to your body.
Step:6 Rotate your elbow under the barbell and extend your arm fully overhead, locking out your elbow.
Step:7 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
name: barbell one arm snatch

instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back with your right foot and place it on the barbell, resting the top of your foot on the bar.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
name: smith sprint lunge

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Jump up explosively, extending your hips, knees, and ankles.
Step:4 While in mid-air, quickly bring your feet together.
Step:5 Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately drop back into a squat position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: bodyweight drop jump squat

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell lunge

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell narrow stance squat

instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:3 Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting on your traps.
Step:4 Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Unrack the bar and take a step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:6 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:7 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as your flexibility allows.
Step:8 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: smith full squat

instructions: Step:1 Place a resistance band around your ankles.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees.
Step:3 Take a step to the side with your right foot, maintaining tension on the resistance band.
Step:4 Follow with your left foot, stepping to the side to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
name: monster walk

instructions: Step:1 Start by sitting on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Place the roller under your glutes, just above your knees.
Step:3 Lean back and place your hands on the ground behind you for support.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and slowly roll the roller forward, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, feeling a stretch in your glutes.
Step:6 Slowly roll the roller back to the starting position, extending your legs.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: roller hip stretch

instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and kneel in front of it.
Step:2 Place your right foot on top of the stability ball, with your knee bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Step:4 Lean forward, pushing your hips towards the stability ball, until you feel a stretch in your right hip flexor.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
name: exercise ball hip flexor stretch

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
Step:2 Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
name: forward lunge (male)

instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, forming an inverted V shape with your body.
Step:3 Lower your upper body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:4 As you lower down, shift your weight forward and transition into a cobra pose by straightening your arms and lifting your chest up.
Step:5 Reverse the movement by bending your elbows and lowering your chest back down towards the ground.
Step:6 Push through your hands to return to the inverted V position.
Step:7 Continue the movement by lowering your hips back down towards the ground, returning to the starting push-up position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: pike-to-cobra push-up

instructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with the roller positioned under your hips.
Step:2 Place your hands on the roller for support.
Step:3 Slowly roll the roller forward, extending your hips and stretching your glutes.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then roll back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: roller hip lat stretch

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving through your heels to jump off the ground.
Step:4 As you jump, shrug your shoulders and pull the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping them close to your body.
Step:5 Catch the dumbbells at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up.
Step:6 Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell clean

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell across your upper back.
Step:2 Take a big step to the side with your right foot, keeping your left foot planted.
Step:3 Bend your right knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your left leg straight.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, stepping with your left foot.
name: barbell lateral lunge

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Jump explosively, extending your hips and knees fully.
Step:4 Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately lower your body back into a squat position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: jump squat v. 2

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to extend your legs and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: sled closer hack squat

instructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support.
Step:3 Slowly lean forward, shifting your weight onto your hands and extending your legs behind you.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your glutes as you push your hips back and up towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Hold this position for a few seconds, feeling a stretch in your glutes.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by bending your knees and lowering your hips back down.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: rocking frog stretch

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your hands clasped together in front of your chest.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Lower your hands towards your toes in a circular motion, reaching as far as you can without straining.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: hands clasped circular toe touch (male)

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and footplate of the smith machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from you by extending your legs, keeping your back against the backrest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position.
Step:6 Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards you, returning to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: smith leg press

instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a mat with your arms extended overhead.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your chest and legs off the ground simultaneously.
Step:3 Kick your legs up and down in a fluttering motion, as if you were swimming.
Step:4 Continue kicking for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:5 Lower your chest and legs back down to the starting position.
name: swimmer kicks v. 2 (male)

instructions: Step:1 Set up a barbell on a rack at knee height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outwards.
Step:3 Bend at the hips and knees to lower yourself down and grip the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift the barbell by extending your hips and knees, pulling your shoulders back and squeezing your glutes at the top.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by bending at the hips and knees.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell rack pull

instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides, palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Step:5 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: low glute bridge on floor

instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides with your palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:4 Tilt your pelvis upward, lifting your hips off the ground. Emphasize inclined control.
Step:5 Hold the bridge position for a few seconds.
Step:6 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: inclined style pelvic tilt into bridge

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footplate. Perform with pointed intensity.
Step:3 Place one foot on the footplate and extend your leg, pushing the sled away from you.
Step:4 Slowly bend your knee and lower the sled back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
name: sled 45 degrees one leg press pointed

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a weight in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, swing the weights forward and upward, keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position, swinging the weights back down.
Step:5 (twisted variation) Repeat with your left foot and continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.
name: weighted lunge with swing twisted

instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your upper legs.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands in front of your thighs, palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent, hinge at the hips and lower the band towards the ground. Focus on controlled movement.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your hamstrings as you lower the band.
Step:5 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: controlled band straight back stiff leg deadlift

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and handlebar position to a comfortable level.
Step:2 Sit on the ergometer with your back straight and feet on the pedals.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with your hands and position your arms at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Start pedaling with your hands, pushing and pulling the handles in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Continue pedaling for the desired duration or number of repetitions.
name: hands bike

instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Once your chest is just above the ground, quickly drop your knees to the ground.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: drop push up

instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell slowly towards your neck, keeping your elbows pointed outwards.
Step:4 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your neck.
Step:5 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: barbell guillotine bench press

instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower, rotate your body to the left, extending your left arm straight out to the side.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position, while rotating your body to the center.
Step:5 Repeat the push-up, this time rotating your body to the right and extending your right arm out to the side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides with each repetition.
name: clock push-up

instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the band handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, pushing the bands away from your chest.
Step:4 Slowly lower the bands back down to your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: band bench press

instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and position it at shoulder height, with your elbow bent and palm facing forward.
Step:3 Slowly press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended, while keeping your core engaged and maintaining balance on the exercise ball.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
name: dumbbell one arm press on exercise ball

instructions: Step:1 Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: weighted straight bar dip

instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and position yourself facing down with your hands on the ball, shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs straight out behind you, balancing on your toes.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your chest towards the ball by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: push-up (on stability ball)

instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing towards your body.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
name: dumbbell one arm reverse grip press

instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: dumbbell around pullover

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at chest level.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back towards your chest, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
name: lever standing chest press

instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, extending the opposite arm out to the side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
name: archer push up

instructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline bench to a 30-45 degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench, keeping your feet flat on the ground.
Step:4 Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:6 Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the motion to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
name: dumbbell incline one arm fly

instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower your body, simultaneously lift your right arm and left leg off the ground, extending them straight out.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your arm and leg back down while pushing yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, this time lifting your left arm and right leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
name: superman push-up

instructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the low pulleys of a cable machine and select an appropriate weight.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
